headline: BMO Initiates Block (XYZ) With “Market Perform” Rating and $74 PT, Cites Materially Improving Operating Model
summary: Backed by one-year EPS and revenue growth estimates of 31.86% and 11.06%, respectively, Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) ranks among the best growth stocks to buy and hold in 2026. On April 22, 2026, BMO Capital initiated coverage on Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) with a “Market Perform” rating and a price target of $74. In doing so, the […]

headline: Black Seed Bagels Triples Volume with Square as Unified Commerce Platform
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., April 29, 2026--Black Seed Bagels, the artisan bagel brand led by James Beard-nominated executive chef and head baker Dianna Daoheung, is utilizing Square’s unified commerce platform to power its growth across New York City, now at 10 locations and counting. Black Seed Bagels first partnered with Square as its technology foundation in 2017. headline: Still believe bitcoin will be worth $1 million or more in the long run: Lightspark's David Marcus
summary: David Marcus, Lightspark co-founder and CEO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the launch of a new global banking platform, Bitcoin 2026 conference, state of crypto, his thoughts on prediction markets, and more.

headline: Spotify Executives Say AI Is Doubling Employee Productivity While Keeping Headcount Flat: 'We Did A Resizing...'
summary: Spotify says AI is doubling employee productivity and accelerating growth while keeping headcount largely flat.
